summary: Decent audience recording of the Uptown Theatre show with no standout musical moments noted by reviewers.
review: Both reviewers consider this NAKS‑Mason audience tape acceptable – one even calls it the best of the three available audience sources, while the other describes it as merely “okay.” No specific performance highlights were mentioned beyond a brief recollection of Alabama Getaway when arriving late.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is largely unremarked (average), while recording quality is viewed as decent to good; weighted average yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape; praised as the preferred version among available audience recordings, with no specific flaws or dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on performance; reviewer only recalls entering late during Alabama Getaway.
